name: Bleu Cheese Salad Dressing
recipeIngredient: 4 oz Wedge of Bleu cheese, crumble
recipeInstructions:
1. Crumble the bleu cheese.
2. Add sour cream and mix well.
3. Add remaining ingredients and mix thoroughly.
4. If the dressing is too thick, thin it with a tablespoon of Half-and-Half or cream. Mix until it reaches the desired consistency.
